items.title: SEC Announces Roundtable on Preparations for 24-Hour Trading
items.raw_excerpt: The Securities and Exchange Commission announced today that it will host a roundtable on Sept. 17, 2026, to discuss moving towards 24-hour trading in the U.S. equity markets, including preparations to support overnight trading, operations and resiliency…
